inputs.label: Your website URL
inputs.description: The primary website to monitor visibility for

inputs.label: Your brand name
inputs.description: The brand or product name to look for in AI search results

inputs.label: Target keywords
inputs.description: Keywords your customers search for when looking for solutions like yours, one per line
inputs.placeholder:
best project management software
project management tool for small teams
how to manage remote team projects

inputs.label: Competitor brands
inputs.description: Competitor brand names and URLs to compare against, one per line (format: Brand Name - https://url.com)
inputs.placeholder:
Asana - https://asana.com
Monday.com - https://monday.com
ClickUp - https://clickup.com

inputs.label: Full report frequency
inputs.description: How often to run the comprehensive visibility report

inputs.label: AI platforms to monitor
inputs.description: Which AI search platforms to check for brand citations

weekly-visibility-report.description: Full search visibility report: SEO health + AI search citations + competitor comparison

activities.intent: Crawl the user's website to assess current SEO health
steps: Run the seo-crawler binary on the user's site_url with --max-pages 50
Save the crawl output for analysis in subsequent steps

activities.intent: Analyze crawl data and produce SEO health score with top issues
steps: Calculate weighted SEO Health Score from crawl data
Identify top 5 technical issues by business impact
Compare against previous week's score if available in memory
Note any new broken links, missing titles, or schema issues

activities.intent: Check if the brand appears in AI search results for target keywords
steps: For each target keyword, open ChatGPT via browser and ask the question naturally
Record whether the brand is mentioned, quoted, or linked in the response
Repeat for Perplexity — search each keyword and check citations
Repeat for Google Gemini — check AI Overview results
For each platform and keyword, record: mentioned (yes/no), position (1st/2nd/3rd mention), context (recommended/listed/compared), direct link (yes/no)
Compare results against previous scan in memory

activities.intent: Compare AI search visibility against competitors
steps: For the same target keywords, check which competitor brands appear in AI responses
Build a visibility matrix: keyword × platform × brand (you vs each competitor)
Identify keywords where competitors are cited but you're not
Identify keywords where you're winning

activities.intent: Compile all findings into a single unified visibility report
steps: Create the report with these sections:
1. HEADLINE: One sentence — the most important change this week
2. VISIBILITY SCORECARD: Table showing Google SEO score + AI citation rate per platform
3. AI SEARCH RESULTS: For each keyword, where the brand appeared (platform, position, context)
4. COMPETITOR COMPARISON: Visibility matrix — who's winning on each keyword × platform
5. WHAT CHANGED: Differences from last report (new citations, lost citations, score changes)
6. ACTION ITEMS: Top 3 things to do this week, prioritized by impact
Store the report in memory for trend tracking
Present the report to the user

ai-citation-check.description: Quick check: is the brand showing up in AI search results right now?

activities.intent: Quick scan of AI search platforms for brand mentions on top 3 keywords
steps: Pick the top 3 target keywords (highest priority)
For each, check one AI platform (rotate: ChatGPT → Perplexity → Gemini)
Record: mentioned yes/no, context
Compare against last check in memory
Only alert the user if something CHANGED (new citation or lost citation)

competitor-visibility.description: Monthly deep competitor visibility analysis across all search surfaces

activities.intent: Crawl competitor sites to assess their SEO health
steps: For each competitor URL, run seo-crawler with --max-pages 20
Extract their SEO health indicators (titles, schema, sitemap, content quality)

activities.intent: Check competitor AI search presence across all target keywords
steps: For ALL target keywords (not just top 3), check all AI platforms
Record every competitor mention: platform, keyword, position, context
Build the full visibility matrix
Identify patterns: which competitors are optimizing for AI search, which are not

activities.intent: Check what competitors changed on their key pages since last month
steps: Run web-differ on competitor pricing pages, feature pages, and homepages
Report significant content changes (new features, pricing changes, messaging shifts)
Assess whether their changes could affect AI citation rankings

activities.intent: Produce a comprehensive monthly competitive visibility report
steps: Create the monthly report with:
1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY: Who's winning AI search visibility this month
2. VISIBILITY LEADERBOARD: Rank all brands by total AI citations across platforms
3. KEYWORD BATTLEGROUND: For each keyword, who owns it on which platform
4. COMPETITOR CHANGES: What they changed on their sites and how it may affect visibility
5. GAPS AND OPPORTUNITIES: Keywords where no one has strong AI presence yet
6. STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATIONS: Top 5 actions to increase visibility
Store in memory for trend tracking

on-demand-check.description: Check AI search visibility for a specific keyword right now

activities.intent: Check all AI platforms for a specific keyword the user provides
steps: Ask the user which keyword to check (or use the one they provided)
Open ChatGPT via browser, ask the question naturally, record brand mentions
Open Perplexity, search the keyword, record citations and sources
Open Google, check for AI Overview, record what brands appear
Present results immediately: where the brand shows up, where it doesn't, who does instead
Suggest what to do if the brand is missing from responses
